title: Mo' Than Enough Guns
description: All of the Mo' Guns firearms with the new JEG features!
body:
![MTEG Logo](https://imgur.com/VVINq6P.png)

Bringing back the nostalgia, M'TEG brings all of the Mo' Guns firearms back using all the new features the Just Enough Guns framework has!

Aditionally, all the recipes remain mostly the same, so you can also see this Add-on as a "Diet-JEG", if you ever found the normal crafting recipes of JEG to be too hard or tedious, this is your solution!

Do keep in mind that this is a Non-canonical add-on, meaning that it won't be as balanced as main JEG, and is mostly made for the fun of it!



Dependency:
[Just Enough Guns](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-guns) and [Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework) are a required mods for every version!



Features!
- M'TEG brings all the OGs back, 36 guns in total!
- 1 trumpet
- 1 new workbench! The Mo' Workbench (I know name does not make sense but it's cute)
- All the recipes from Mo' Guns remain almost the same!



Feedback!
In order to keep the mod alive and well, I invite every user that downloads it to leave a comment or send me a message via [Discord](https://discord.gg/3r7NE3Rfwg) @alanorMiga with your thoughts on it!

Please do keep in mind this is a very early release and I have a ton of features planned for the future, welcome to this journey!
